title: Notifications - Update Available
scenario: Verify that a "Update Available" notification appears when a device has outdated firmware and the Poly App is in the background, and tapping it redirects to Device Settings > Software Update.
steps: Ensure the device has a firmware version lower than the current version on the Cloud server.
Ensure the Poly App is running in the background on the mobile device.
Observe the mobile device for a 'Update Available' notification.
Verify that the Poly App opens.
Verify that the app redirects to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
expected: A "Update Available" notification appears. Tapping it opens the app and redirects to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
